summary: The diff shows backend migration setup, backend actor implementation with user profiles and inquiry system, frontend branding updates on Home page and index.html, plus architectural state tracking. However, the diff is heavily truncated (Home.tsx and frontend-file-summaries.txt are cut off), limiting full verification of all requirements.

missing_requirements.requirement: All seven pages accessible: Home, About, Services, Recruitment, Gallery, Team, Contact
missing_requirements.reason: While frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions Team route and pages like About, Services, Contact, Gallery, and Recruitment, no actual implementation code is visible for Gallery or Recruitment pages. The summaries reference these pages but truncation prevents verification of their existence and content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Header and footer show Escoffiers logo and navigation
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions Header.tsx and Footer.tsx with BrandLogo component, but no actual implementation code is provided to verify the logo displays correctly or that navigation includes all seven pages.

missing_requirements.requirement: No Internet Computer rainbow logo or 'Enter your name' form appears anywhere
missing_requirements.reason: Cannot verify absence of default ICP elements without seeing complete frontend implementation. Only Home.tsx partial and summaries are visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Contact form successfully submits inquiries and shows success message
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt references ContactForm.tsx with submission hook, but actual implementation is not visible to verify success message display and submission flow.

missing_requirements.requirement: Login button triggers Internet Identity authentication flow
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions LoginButton.tsx with Internet Identity integration, but implementation code is not provided to verify the authentication flow works correctly.

missing_requirements.requirement: Authenticated admin users can view inquiries dashboard
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions admin/Inquiries.tsx with authentication protection, but actual implementation is not visible to verify dashboard functionality.

missing_requirements.requirement: All navigation links route to correct pages without errors
missing_requirements.reason: Cannot verify routing implementation without seeing complete App.tsx or router configuration. Only partial references in summaries exist.

missing_requirements.requirement: About page displays company history and founding year 2013
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions About page with company profile and 2013 reference, but actual page implementation is not provided to verify content accuracy.

missing_requirements.requirement: Services page shows all seven consulting service offerings with icons
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions Services page with seven services, but implementation is not visible to verify all seven offerings are present with icons.

missing_requirements.requirement: Recruitment page details domestic and international hiring services
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt does not explicitly mention a Recruitment.tsx file, and no implementation code is provided to verify this page exists with required content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Gallery page showcases kitchen design, restaurant concepts, and cloud kitchens
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt does not explicitly mention a Gallery.tsx file, and no implementation code is provided to verify this page exists with required project categories.

missing_requirements.requirement: Team page displays company expertise through feature cards
missing_requirements.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions /team route but provides no details about Team.tsx implementation or verification of feature cards displaying company expertise.
